name: poly_bevel_Q3_square_segs2
description: Polygon Bevel (mesh.bevel, edit-mode Polygons) SQUARE CORNER + SEGMENTS -- task 0458 Phase 3, finding Q3. One cube top (+Y) face, inset=0.25, shift=0.15, segments=2, square=true, group=false. Reference topology: 8v/6f -> 24v/18f. Square is NOT rejected when combined with segments -- it applies ONLY at the OUTERMOST ring (original boundary -> ring[1]), split distance = that ring's own inset (inset/segs = 0.125); the remaining ring (ring[1] -> ring[2]=final) interpolates via plain (unsquared) quads, unchanged from the ordinary segments path.
source: Frozen reference-editor capture via the private capture harness's polygon-bevel op (task 0458 Phase 0 dump-oracle poly_bevel_Q3_square_segs2). Tests whether the Square-Corner topology rewrite composes with the multi-ring segment staircase.

provenance.harness: private capture harness (reference-editor polygon-bevel tool, headless scripted op-dump)
provenance.notes: Phase-0 dump-oracle for square=true + segments=2. Kernel implemented task 0458 Phase 3 (bevelFacesByMask's square param, source/mesh.d) -- square wraps only the outermost (t=0 -> t=1) ring; deeper segment rings are unaffected plain quads.
